forgotPassword.title: Forgot my password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Set password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been saved. You can continue now.
